headline: Norfolk Southern: A Steady Quarter, Amid Ongoing M&A Talks
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation is rated Hold with shares trading near fair value at $291 versus a fair price of $293. Read more on NSC stock here.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks Walking a Fine Line
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.
